sourceMovie.title: My Days of Mercy
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: My Days of Mercy (2018) stuck because it commits to its romance premise without apologizing—viewers remember set pieces and momentum as much as plot. Tali Shalom-Ezer's control of tone keeps the ride coherent. The romance and drama blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: Five Feet Apart
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If My Days of Mercy clicked for you, Five Feet Apart (2019) is a strong next stop: both trade in romance and drama, with emotional whiplash that feels honest. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after My Days of Mercy?
faq.answer: Try Five Feet Apart, Endless Love, Monster's Ball—each shares DNA with My Days of Mercy while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is My Days of Mercy?
faq.answer: My Days of Mercy (2018) is best described as Romance, Drama. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is My Days of Mercy worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 7.3/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this romance lane.
